name: @platform/config-runtime
description: Configuration service: environment variable loading, schema validation, typed config access, and secret resolution.

readme.summary: Configuration service: environment variable loading, schema validation, typed config access, and secret resolution.
responsibilities: Load and validate environment variables against a typed schema at process start
Provide typed, readonly config accessors to other platform packages
Resolve secret references from external secret stores (e.g. AWS Secrets Manager)
Fail fast at startup if required config is absent or malformed
nonResponsibilities: Does not store or persist configuration in a database
Does not expose config over HTTP or as a public API
Does not own feature flags or runtime toggles
usage: Imported by adapter and runtime packages to access their required configuration
Call once at process start to validate and freeze the config object
operationalNotes: Config is validated and frozen at startup — mutation after boot is not supported
Secret resolution may incur I/O latency on first access
